title: aeschynomene schindleri
intro: Aeschynomene schindleri, also known as the Schindler's horsefly pea, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aeschynomene schindleri can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, where the dried leaves and flowers are steeped in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
